invalidation.zh: 如果价格跌破88000（低于当前支撑）或资金费率转为负且低于-0.01%（空头压力加剧），则假设失效。
invalidation.en: Invalidated if price breaks below 88000 (below current support) or funding rate turns negative and below -0.01% (short pressure intensifies).

invalidation.zh: 如果价格跌破880（低于SMA50支撑）或资金费率Z-score转为正值且高于+50%（空头压力缓解），则假设失效。
invalidation.en: Invalidated if price breaks below 880 (below SMA50 support) or funding Z-score turns positive and above +50% (short pressure eases).

invalidation.zh: 如果价格突破0.13（高于当前阻力）或资金费率Z-score降至+50%以下（多头压力缓解），则假设失效。
invalidation.en: Invalidated if price breaks above 0.13 (above current resistance) or funding Z-score drops below +50% (long pressure eases).
